summary: Typewriter writing animation text component with cursor blinking for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-typewriter/src/TitleTypewriter.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleTypewriter` and `titleTypewriterDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleTypewriter` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Typewriter Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-typewriter to my project. Preserve the exported TitleTypewriterProps API and register the TitleTypewriter composition with the default props.
